name: lead-research-assistant
description: Identifies high-quality leads for your product or service by analyzing
capabilities: Analyze your product or service to understand value proposition
Identify target companies matching your ideal customer profile
Score and prioritize leads based on fit and relevance
Research decision-makers and gather contact context
Provide personalized outreach strategies for each lead
author: Joseph OBrien
securitySummary: This is a pure prompt-based skill containing only documentation and markdown templates. No executable code, scripts, network calls, filesystem access, or command execution capabilities detected. All 48 static findings are false positives triggered by documentation patterns.
valueStatement: Finding qualified leads takes hours of manual research. This skill analyzes your business, identifies matching companies, and provides personalized contact strategies so you can focus on outreach instead of research.
limitations: Does not access real-time company databases or APIs
Cannot verify current contact information accuracy
Cannot send emails or make calls directly
Results depend on information you provide and AI knowledge

useCases.title: Build prospect lists
useCases.description: Generate qualified lists of companies that match your ideal customer profile with prioritized contact strategies.

useCases.title: Find partnership targets
useCases.description: Identify companies for strategic partnerships by analyzing complementary products and market fit.

useCases.title: Launch go-to-market
useCases.description: Quickly build initial outreach lists when entering new markets or launching new products.

promptTemplates.title: Quick lead search
promptTemplates.prompt: I sell [product description]. Find me 10 companies in [location/industry] that would benefit from this.

promptTemplates.title: Analyze codebase
promptTemplates.prompt: Look at what I am building in this repository and identify the top 10 companies in [location] that would benefit from this product.

promptTemplates.title: Detailed profile
promptTemplates.prompt: My product: [description]. Target: [industry], [size], [location]. Find 20 qualified leads with specific contact strategies.

promptTemplates.title: Competitive analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: My product competes with [competitor]. Identify their customers who would benefit from switching to my solution.

bestPractices: Provide specific industry, location, and company size criteria for better results
Run the skill from your codebase directory when applicable for automatic context
Ask for follow-up research on top-ranked leads to deepen qualification
antiPatterns: Vague product descriptions that lack clear value proposition
Missing target market constraints leading to irrelevant results
Skipping the fit score review and going straight to outreach

faq.question: What AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. All versions support the full lead research workflow.

faq.question: How many leads can I find at once?
faq.answer: The skill can handle requests for 10-50 leads depending on specificity. More detailed criteria produces better results.

faq.question: Can I integrate with my CRM?
faq.answer: The skill can format results as CSV for easy import into CRM tools like Salesforce or HubSpot.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This is a prompt-based skill with no code execution. No data leaves your session except what you share.

faq.question: Why are some leads missing contact info?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance based on available context. For verified contact data, combine with dedicated enrichment tools.

faq.question: How is this different from paid lead databases?
faq.answer: This skill uses AI reasoning to find and qualify leads without subscription costs. Accuracy depends on provided criteria.
